as_of.title: The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System

inflation.label: broadening / underlying
inflation.note: Core PCE at 3.3% (highest since 2023) from gasoline and tariffs, but she fears shocks embedding into price- and wage-setting and flags AI-driven price pressures.
inflation.quote: After five years of above-target inflation, I am particularly attuned to the risk that elevated inflation will become embedded in price- and wage-setting behavior.

labor.label: stable / balanced
labor.note: Labor market largely stable with unemployment at 4.3%, but she sees elevated downside risks.
labor.quote: In contrast to inflation, the labor market appears to be largely stable.

stance.label: appropriate / well positioned
stance.note: On a risk-management basis she judges holding rates steady to be the right course, with risks tilted toward higher inflation.
stance.quote: from a risk-management perspective, I currently believe that the right course of action is to hold rates steady
